fields.name: Ambush
fields.description: When you attack from hiding or spring a trap, you get +1d.

fields.name: Cascade Effect
fields.description: If you roll a 6 from your resistance roll to resist a physical or bizarre consequence, the attacker suffers a mirrored backlash.

fields.name: Final Barrage
fields.description: When reduced to 0 HP or Level 4 harm, make a potent Stand attack before going down.

fields.name: Parry and Break
fields.description: On a successful resistance roll, counterattack with potency (+1 effect).

fields.name: Phantom Pain
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to make your stand attack through cover, walls, or barriers that would otherwise block it. Works within your stand range.

fields.name: Savage
fields.description: When you unleash physical violence, it's especially frightening. When you command a frightened target, take +1d.

fields.name: Spin-Boosted Blow
fields.description: Add Spin to your next Stand attack to supercharge a single strike (adds +1 effect and +1d).

fields.name: Steady Barrage
fields.description: You can barrage targets up to your Stand's range. Add +1d when making multiple rapid-fire attacks.

fields.name: Invigorated
fields.description: You recover from harm faster. Permanently fill in one of your healing clock segments. Take +1d to healing treatment rolls.

fields.name: Legendary Guard
fields.description: Once per score, you may completely negate one instance of incoming harm.

fields.name: Battleborn
fields.description: You may expend your stand armor to reduce harm from an attack in combat or to push yourself during a fight.

fields.name: Swan Song
fields.description: When you'd be taken out (Level 4 harm), spend remaining Stand armor charges to stay standing for one heroic action.

fields.name: Iron Will
fields.description: You're immune to the terror that some bizarre entities inflict on sight. Take +1d to resistance rolls with Resolve.

fields.name: Tough as Nails
fields.description: Penalties from harm are one level less severe (though level 4 harm is still fatal).

fields.name: Fortitude
fields.description: Expend your Stand armor to resist a consequence of fatigue, weakness, or chemical effects, or to push yourself when working with technical skill or handling chemicals.

fields.name: Overdrive
fields.description: While wearing non-Stand armor, gain an extra +1 armor.

fields.name: Masochist
fields.description: When your Stand takes harm, reduce the user's damage by 1 level. If the Stand hits Level 4 harm, both die.

fields.name: Undying Will
fields.description: When taking Level 3 harm, you can act normally for one round. Afterwards, actions cost 2 stress.

fields.name: Rule of Cool
fields.description: Once per score, when you do something genuinely dramatic or stylish, clear 2 stress.

fields.name: Bizarre Step
fields.description: Push (2 stress) to instantly reposition within your stand's range. Nearby observers must resist or lose track of you.

fields.name: Cloak & Dagger
fields.description: When you use a disguise or other form of covert misdirection, you get +1d to rolls to confuse or deflect suspicion. When you throw off your disguise, the resulting surprise gives you the initiative in the situation.

fields.name: Mesmeriser
fields.description: When you Sway someone, you may cause them to forget that it's happened until they next interact with you.

fields.name: Saboteur
fields.description: When you wreck, the work is much quieter than it should be and the damage is hidden from casual inspection.

fields.name: Shadow
fields.description: Expend your Stand armor to resist a consequence from detection, surveillance, or security measures, or to push yourself for a feat of athletics or stealth.

fields.name: Subterfuge
fields.description: You may expend your stand armor to resist a consequence from suspicion or persuasion, or to push yourself for subterfuge.

fields.name: Bizarre Intuition
fields.description: You have a bizarre sense for danger. You cannot be surprised and always act first in ambush situations.

fields.name: Focused
fields.description: You may expend your stand armor to resist a consequence of surprise or mental harm (fear, confusion, losing track of someone).

fields.name: Like Looking into a Mirror
fields.description: You can always tell when someone is lying.

fields.name: Mastermind
fields.description: You're always aware of supernatural entities in your presence. Take +1d when you gather info about the bizarre.

fields.name: Neural Lace
fields.description: By touching your Stand, you may read surface thoughts of nearby targets.

fields.name: Scout
fields.description: When you gather info to locate a target, you get +1 effect. When you hide in a prepared position or use camouflage, you get +1d to roll to avoid detection.

fields.name: Shared Vision
fields.description: You can see through your Stand's eyes, even at extreme distances.

fields.name: Aura of Confidence
fields.description: Your presence inspires trust and courage. Allies within close range of you gain +1d to resistance rolls against fear or intimidation.

fields.name: Notorious
fields.description: Your reputation precedes you. Once per score, you may invoke your crew's infamy to skip a social obstacle entirely - the GM decides what complication arises later.

fields.name: Scoundrel
fields.description: You gain +1d to Consort when you gather information on a target for a score. You get +1d to the engagement roll for that operation.

fields.name: Trust in Me
fields.description: You get +1d vs. a target with whom you have an intimate relationship.

fields.name: Foresight
fields.description: Twice per score, you can assist a teammate without paying stress. Tell us how you prepared for this.

fields.name: Bodyguard
fields.description: When you protect a teammate, take +1d to your resistance roll. When you gather info to anticipate possible threats in the current situation, you get +1 effect.

fields.name: Guardian
fields.description: You may expend your stand armor to protect a teammate.

fields.name: Functioning Vice
fields.description: When you indulge your vice, you may adjust the dice outcome by 1 or 2 (up or down). An ally who joins in your vice may do the same.

fields.name: Stand Proud
fields.description: When you Command an ally in combat, they continue to fight when they would otherwise break (they're not taken out when they suffer level 3 harm). They gain +1 effect and 1 armor.

fields.name: Analyst
fields.description: During downtime, you get two ticks to distribute among any long-term project clocks that involve investigation or learning a new formula or design plan.

fields.name: Expertise
fields.description: Choose one of your action ratings. When you lead a group action using that action, you can suffer only 1 stress at most, regardless of the number of failed rolls.

fields.name: Calculating
fields.description: Due to your careful planning, during downtime, you may give yourself or another crew member +1 downtime action.

fields.name: The Devil's Footsteps
fields.description: When you push yourself, choose one of the following additional benefits: perform a feat of athletics that verges past superhuman for 1 scene, or maneuver to confuse your enemies so they mistakenly attack each other.

fields.name: Superhero Landing
fields.description: Expend Stand armor to reduce fall/collision harm by 1. Gain +1d for stylish aerial actions.

fields.name: Daredevil
fields.description: When you roll a desperate action, you get +1d to your roll if you also take -1d to any resistance roll(s) against consequences from your action(s).

fields.name: Bizarre Improvisation
fields.description: Take 2 stress to roll your best action rating while performing a different action. Say how you adapt your skill to this use.

fields.name: Automatic Trigger
fields.description: Load your Stand with a conditional action (e.g., "If X enters the room, detonate.").

fields.name: Weapon Recall
fields.description: Your Stand returns to your hand instantly when thrown or disarmed.

fields.name: Stand Evolution
fields.description: Spend 5 stress mid-score to unlock a temporary new unique ability.

fields.name: Channel Force
fields.description: Redirect a supernatural force through your Stand's form or medium.

fields.name: Requiem
fields.description: Spend 5 stress to elevate your stand beyond its normal limits temporarily. For one scene, treat all your stand coin stats as one grade higher.
